# Keystone Legal — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A law firm specializing in real estate legal services, offering professional legal counsel and representation for real estate transactions, disputes, and related matters. The firm aims to project trust, authority, and expertise in the real estate sector.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Protect your biggest investment with affordable legal services from Keystone Legal. Expert real estate law counsel for transactions, disputes, and more. Get a free consultation today.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Keystone Legal
A law firm specializing in real estate legal services, offering professional legal counsel and representation for real estate transactions, disputes, and related matters. The firm aims to project trust, authority, and expertise in the real estate sector.

## Services/Products
- real estate law

## Target Audience
- First-time Homebuyers
- Real Estate Investors
- Real Estate Agents

## Industry
Legal Services

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
